title: Tundra Tactic Hub
subtitle: Vehicle statistics, interactive maps, combat lineups, and projectile ballistics
wikiSource: Data Source: Official War Thunder Wiki
noDataMessage: WARNING: Statistics are missing or require data source. Please upload a JSON file in the stats tab.
importExportDesc: Upload external statistics JSON databases or manually edit telemetry. This console integrates winrates, newly patched vehicles, and maps automatically.
importPlaceholder: Paste custom statistics JSON or drag-and-drop here...
customStatsLoaded: Success! New telemetry dataset integrated into the local engine.
allSections: All Sections (Tanks, Planes, Helicopters, Coastal Fleet, Bluewater Fleet)
mapGlobalDesc: Global Tactical Description of the Map
mapBenefit1: Large distances for deploying ATGMs and long-range APFSDS
mapBenefit2: Dense forests at borders hinder UAV spotting and surveillance
mapBenefit3: Complex urban terrain with shattered brick structures
mapThreat1: Paved flat roads are completely exposed to sniper hunters
mapThreat2: Narrow river corridors can easily be choked by one heavy assault gun
mapThreat3: Vulnerability to spawn-camping in late battle stages
ammoTableDesc: Comprehensive physical analysis of frontal armor penetration and raw explosive payload of AP, APHE, HEAT-FS, and HESH projectiles retrieved from official War Thunder Wiki.
lineupSubtitle: Select Battle Rating and nation to preview the most synchronized lineup of ground, aviation, and fleet support units.
navalSupportNav: Naval escort support is unavailable at this Battle Rating.
notFoundDesc: No detailed lineup has been logged for this Battle Rating and nation yet. Import statistics to declare custom tactical groups.
newsSubtitle: Latest War Thunder updates directly from Gaijin developers and tactical analysis.
analytcisModes: Assault & game modes walkthrough (AB / RB / SB)
forumDiscussions: Battle Rating updates on official forum
downloadGameDesc: Official client download link for PC and consoles directly from Gaijin Entertainment servers.
gajinDisclaimer: All rights and trademarks for combat systems and badges belong to Gaijin Entertainment Corp.
performanceIndicators: Performance indicators (AB / RB / SB) from War Thunder Wiki
invalidJson: Please enter a valid JSON code.
databaseReset: Database successfully reset to default values.
mapVerificationText: Coordinates, sniping sectors, and ambush spots are verified by the War Thunder Wiki community.
pointDefaultDesc: This point provides critical tactical advantages. Utilizing nearby cover is highly recommended.
videoNotAdded: Video guide has not been added yet
videoLazyLoad: Click to load YouTube player (Lazy Loading)
mapProTip: 💡 Pro-Tip: Enable the Laser Rangefinder, click any starting and landing spots to measure ballistic firing distances.
